name: Iligan Tech Volunteers
description: A grassroots collective of developers, designers, and civic workers building digital tools to bridge the gap between local government operations and the citizens of Iligan City.

name: Save the Waterfalls Initiative
description: An environmental advocacy group dedicated to preserving Iligan's 23 waterfalls through community clean-up drives, tree planting, and eco-tourism education.

name: Sangguniang Kabataan - Brgy. Tibanga
description: The official youth council of Barangay Tibanga, organizing sports fests, leadership seminars, and community service programs for local youth.
